PORT.description: HTTP port the server listens on

DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN.description: Discord bot token (Bot → Token in Developer Portal)

DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID.description: Discord application / client ID (General Information → Application ID)

DISCORD_GUILD_ID.description: Discord server / guild ID where slash commands are registered

DISCORD_PUBLIC_KEY.description: Ed25519 public key for verifying Discord webhook signatures (General Information → Public Key)
